hero.art_prompt: Aditya, 18, cheerfully using a laptop at his family's small neighbourhood shop counter, running the shop and studying online at the same time, bright hopeful daytime, warm and aspirational.

panels.narration: By day, Aditya runs the family shop.
panels.dialogue: I can't sit in class all day.
panels.img_prompt: Aditya, 18, at his family's small shop counter serving a customer, a college admission flyer set aside, looking a little torn, warm daytime.

panels.narration: A campus degree meant leaving it all.
panels.dialogue: Who minds the shop if I go?
panels.img_prompt: Aditya looking worried, glancing between the busy family shop and a city-college brochure in his hand, modest setting.

panels.narration: Then he found an online BBA.
panels.img_prompt: Aditya's face lighting up with relief and excitement at a laptop on the shop counter showing an online BBA, warm glow.

panels.narration: Now he studies once the shutters close.
panels.img_prompt: Aditya happily studying on a laptop late at night in the closed family shop, books beside him, proud and determined.

turn.title: Why Online BBA Just Works
points: Study 100% online, anytime, from your phone or laptop. No campus, no commute.
The same UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ BBA as on-campus, recognised everywhere.
Just ₹45,000/year with 0% interest EMI, or 15% off on upfront payment.
Weekend live classes plus recordings, so learning fits around your work.

testimonials.name: Aditya Rao
testimonials.quote: I study after the shutters close. I never had to choose between earning and learning.

testimonials.name: Sneha K
testimonials.quote: No good college near my town. Online BBA let me study from home, no relocation, no hostel.

testimonials.name: Rahul M
testimonials.quote: Weekend live classes fit around my part-time job, and the monthly EMI fit my budget.

testimonials.name: Priya S
testimonials.quote: A recognised degree, earned online while I worked. My employer accepted it instantly.

facts.v: 100% online, learn anytime with weekend live classes
₹45,000/year (₹50,000 for Digital Mktg & Data Sci + AI)
